productDisplayName: Puma Women BodyTrain Alt Black Green Shoe
description: These stylish shoes from puma tones the front and back leg muscles to enhance natural movement and overall look. These lightweight shoes are great or regular wear since their attractive low-profile design makes it perfect for casual wear. You can team these with jeans and tees and walk your way to sexy everywhere you go.UpperSynthetic leather uppers for durability and protectionPerforations on the uppers and mesh tongue for enhanced breathabilityElasticated loop with velcro closure for a snug Fit and easy insertion and removal of the feetPadded collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for extra comfortpuma formstripes on the sidesBrand name appliqued on the tongue and cat logo on velcro closureMidsoleEco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning Soft-density IdCell technology compresses the midsole to create resistance as you moveIdCell technology continues through the front of the sole to create resistance and increased muscle activation in the front of your legs and calvesOutsoleBeveled heel maximizes leg extension in each strideGroove running the length of the sole counteracts pronation and increases stability
